title: Papyrus #0405: Greek-Egyptian Literary Fragment
description: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — literary fragment document.
introduction: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — literary fragment document.

translation.text: From the papyrus collections of Greco-Roman Egypt: a literary fragment document preserved in the dry sands. These papyri document daily life in ways no monumental inscription can.
